companyProfile.companyDescription: Tata Steel Ltd is an India-based steel company. The Company is engaged in the manufacturing and marketing of crude steel products. It operates through three segments: flat products, long products and special products. Its flat products include flat steel, plate, and sheet steel; hot and cold rolled coils; electrical steels, such as mild and high-strength steel bars, wire rods, wires and cables; and stainless steel.
